next_experiment: Construct a Type II witness that does not factor through primorial residues below the full candidate scale and transfer it to exact gap two.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: This is a quantitative no-go theorem for a growing class of local classifiers, not a Twin Prime counterexample. It does not exclude near-full-scale or genuinely analytic parity-sensitive information.
